Interface BasicType<X>

Type Parameters:
X - The represented basic type
All Superinterfaces:
Type<X>
public interface BasicType<X> extends Type<X>
An instance of BasicType represents a basic type (possibly an enumerated, LOB, or temporal type).
Since:
2.0
